hero.subtitle: Declarative, signed, sovereign. Built for EU operators under NIS2, DORA, ISO 27001, and ANSSI BP-028.
hero.command_caption: Single-host signed-evidence demo. Requires Nix with flakes enabled and /dev/kvm. macOS: see docs.

cta.title: Run a 3-month pilot. 5–15 hosts. Free.
cta.subtitle: Move your regulated workloads to a declarative substrate. Keep the rest where it is. We help you stand up the regulated zone with signed evidence ready for your auditor, whether you already run NixOS or migrate from Ansible / Puppet / Chef during the 12 weeks.

footer.tagline: Signed GitOps fleet management for regulated Europe.
footer.license: MIT framework · AGPL control plane · European sovereignty · 2026

product.title: The signed GitOps loop
product.subtitle: Commit → CI signs → control plane verifies → agent verifies → activate. Each step is its own cryptographic gate.

compliance.title: 16 controls. 4 frameworks. Signed evidence.
compliance.subtitle: NIS2 · DORA · ISO 27001 · ANSSI BP-028. Article-by-article mapping, auditable offline.

complianceNis2.title: NIS2 - Article 21 mapping
complianceNis2.subtitle: Ten sub-articles. The 16 typed controls satisfy each through framework presets.

complianceIso27001.title: ISO 27001:2022 - Annex A mapping
complianceIso27001.subtitle: Annex A controls across A.5 (organisational) and A.8 (technological).

complianceAnssi.title: ANSSI BP-028 v2.0 - mapping
complianceAnssi.subtitle: Recommendations R7 through R14 + R33. Four hardening levels, three host categories.

complianceNis2Entity.title: NIS2 entity classification
complianceNis2Entity.subtitle: Essential vs. important: how the entity-type flag shifts thresholds across the fleet.

vision.title: Cryptographic citizenship of the fleet
vision.subtitle: The signed-artifact chain establishes identity in software today. Hardware binding anchors it in the silicon. Foundation already shipping.

pilot.title: 3-month pilot. 5–15 hosts. Zero cost.
pilot.subtitle: Your regulated zone on a declarative substrate. Signed NIS2 evidence packet at month 3. Sovereignty preserved from day one.

demo.title: 4 VMs. 10 minutes. The full GitOps loop, locally.
demo.subtitle: Bootstrap a working fleet on your laptop and watch the signed-artifact chain converge.

about.title: About Arcanesys
about.subtitle: Why we built this. Why now. What this is not.

contact.subtitle: Tell us about your fleet and your regulatory regime. We get back to you within one business day.

privacy.subtitle: GDPR-minimal. We collect only what we need to talk to you.
